reviews.comment:
Mi parada de siempre en mis viajes a Necochea. Mucho verde, mesitas para sentarse a comer, buenos baños, buena atención de los playeros, todo ok

(Translated by Google)
My usual stop on my trips to Necochea. Lots of greenery, tables to sit and eat, good restrooms, good service from the attendants, everything's great.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRNmFpRzJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
El restaurant nos estafo con el precio de la comida,la comida  encima es malisima de pesima calidad.Si paran ahi tengan mucho cuidado.

(Translated by Google)
The restaurant ripped us off with the price of the food, and on top of that, the food was terrible, of awful quality. If you stop there, be very careful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBLWJxcFd3EAE

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar y atención. Lástima que si vas en temporada tenés que tragarte unas colas infernales para cargar nafta. Ahh y no pidas una hamburguesa con papas fritas porque te miran con cara de culo. No molestes al personal.

(Translated by Google)
Nice place and good service. It's a shame that if you go during peak season you have to endure horrendous lines to get gas. Oh, and don't order a burger and fries because they'll give you dirty looks. Don't bother the staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNncU8tZDdBRRAB
